name: mystic_mirror
description: Fairy gym Mirror Match dialog-routing regression (ROUTING ONLY - no battle click). Titania's declare entry (prio 15, gate defeated_mystic_apprentice + no_mm_declared) offers five lead buttons; each tags lead_<type> + mm_declared, so the matching mirror_<type> entry (prio 16) preempts on re-open. mm_declared permanently blocks re-declare BY DESIGN (declare needs no_mm_declared and nothing removes mm_declared), so the second type is reached by rcon tag surgery. The preamble force-opens the routing lane on Titania's ladder: adds defeated_mystic_apprentice (declare/mirror gate), adds mc_gym3_done (suppresses mc_locked prio 18, gated no_mc_gym3_done), removes defeated_mystic_leader (suppresses the 'after' entry prio 20), and resets the mystic_tower score (suppresses ready_weakened prio 17 via the mystic_tower_gte_4 band tag). DELIBERATELY ends at the routing asserts: clicking 'Challenge the Gym' starts a TBCS battle exposed to the KNOWN intermittent TBCS stall (~50% - send-outs complete then the battle waits forever); the button RENDERING under the right lead tag IS the regression surface, so we never click it.

steps.comment: -- reset (idempotent re-runs): every tag this scenario sets, plus the three higher-priority entries that would preempt the mirror lane --

steps.comment_: the 'after' entry (prio 20) gates on this; test player has not beaten Titania, remove defensively
ready_weakened (prio 17) gates on the mystic_tower_gte_4 band tag; band_tags drops it next tick once the score is unset
instant removal so we do not race the band tick
shared gate of declare + every mirror_<type> entry
mc_locked (prio 18) needs no_mc_gym3_done; owning the milestone tag makes band_tags drop that inverse next tick

steps.comment: -- tp to the gym, then a settle sleep so band_tags resyncs the derived no_* tags (no_mm_declared must come BACK after the removal above, no_mc_gym3_done must drop) --
-- lane sanity: exactly the declare gate should hold now --
-- beat 1: the declare entry (prio 15) - assert via BUTTON labels, the say pair rotates --

steps.comment_: button commands land, then band_tags must drop no_mm_declared before the re-open

steps.comment: -- beat 2: re-open - mirror_fire (prio 16) must preempt; prose any-of covers both rotating say lines --

expect_screen_text: You lead with fire, so the marsh went looking for fire in me. Look at what surfaced beside my familiars — still water always sends back something of whoever leans over it. Come and fight what it made of you.

A flame at your front. The mist has been drinking its light since you declared it, and now something at my side flickers the same way. The marsh shows every challenger a piece of themselves. This piece is yours.

steps.comment_: the battle button rendering IS the assert - do NOT click it; that path starts a TBCS battle with the known ~50% stall

steps.comment: -- beat 3: second type via tag surgery. Re-declare is impossible by design (mm_declared blocks declare and never clears), so swap the lead tag directly and keep mm_declared --

expect_screen_text: You lead with water. Bold, to bring a current into a marsh — it has already been folded into mine. When my team meets yours, you will be fighting a little of your own reflection.
Water answers water here. The marsh borrowed the shape of your lead and handed it back to me. Do not blink when you recognize it across the field.

steps.comment_: again: render-assert only, never clicked (TBCS stall exposure)

steps.comment: -- cleanup: strip every tag this scenario set so no other scenario inherits the lane --
